<?php namespace Spatie\Ignition\Solutions\SolutionProviders; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\SolutionProviderRepository as BaseSolutionProviderRepositoryAlias; use Spatie\Ignition\Contracts\SolutionProviderRepository as SolutionProviderRepositoryContract; class SolutionProviderRepository extends BaseSolutionProviderRepositoryAlias implements SolutionProviderRepositoryContract { }
